original: Your shield crackles but holds.
There is a concussive boom and tingling aftershock of energy as your shield collapses under the impact.
You take a moment to shake the stars from your vision
, your rapid introduction to the floor surprisingly painful considering the circumstances
You tuck out of the way!

The parasite’s discharge makes its mark, smothering you in a volatile mix of a supersaturated batch of its oily residue and dense cloud of prurient perspiration -- however, the airtight properties of your [pc.armor] proves such an attack completely useless.
The parasite’s discharge makes its mark, smothering you in a volatile mix of a supersaturated batch of its oily residue and dense cloud of prurient perspiration.
Your head is encased in the parasite’s embrace, smothering you in its slick, salacious skin. Its secretions are seeping into you; its aroma greets you with every attempt to breathe.
The parasite’s cloud envelops and consumes you, but it does so in vain. Your [pc.armor] prevents the stuff from contacting your skin, sparing your lust of wanton desires.
You’re too disoriented to get out of the veil before it can sink its fangs into you. The best you can hope for is for it to dissipate on its own.

You’re quick enough to avoid being hit head-on, but the parasite manages to brush up against you as it sails by. Oily perspiration smears along your [pc.armor], but it is all for naught thanks to your outfit’s impermeability.
You dodge!
It successfully hooks onto your [pc.leg] and pulls it out from under you, tripping you hard against the ground.
The creature quickly slides off, waiting for the opportune moment to strike you again.
Anticipating the Mimbranes attack, you’re already poised to avoid the creatures mist before it can take effect.
The parasite’s cloud of wanton desire consumes you, seeping into every pore and driving you ever further off the edge.
You dart out of the venomous cloud before it has an opportunity to seep into your bloodstream.
You twist out of the path of the speeding Mimbrane at the last second!
You quickly brush off the residue before it can affect you more than it already has.

You’re quick enough to avoid being hit head-on, but the parasite manages to brush up against you as it sails by. Oily perspiration smears along your "+({var0}?"[pc.armor]":"body")+", forcing a healthy whiff of wanton lust down your nostrils.
